script.name: plugin.guilds.createtask
script.description: Guilds: Add a new task for a guild
script.sourceplaintext:
$page.id = get global variable: name='pageid.guilds' $Guilds.Data = get global variable: name='guilds.data' skip if $Guilds.Data return null
$table.guild = $Guilds.Data[$a.guild] skip if $table.guild return null
$table.tasks = $Guilds.Data['tasks'] if not $table.tasks $table.tasks = table alloc $Guilds.Data['tasks'] = $table.tasks end
$last.task = $Guilds.Data['last.task'] skip if $last.task $last.task = 0 inc $last.task =
do if $last.task > 2000000000 $last.task = 1
$min.difficulty = 1 $max.difficulty = 7 $min.reward = 800000 $max.reward = 1000000 $min.boost = 200000 $max.boost = 300000 $min.xp = 100 $max.xp = 200 $xp.boost = 10 $sector = $a.sector if is datatype[ $sector ] == DATATYPE_ARRAY $sector = get random array item: array=$sector else if is datatype[ $sector ] == DATATYPE_TABLE $sector = get random key: table=$sector end
if is datatype[ $sector ] == DATATYPE_RACE @ $main.universe = [THIS] -> call script plugin.guilds.utils : type='mainUniverse' Value1=null Value 2=null $sector = find a random sector: startsector=$main.universe, jumps=100, owner=$sector end
skip if $sector return null
$sector.owner = $sector -> get owner race
if $a.type == 'attackway' $md.type = sprintf: fmt='%s.task.attackway', $a.guild, null, null, null, null $a.type = create new array, arguments='combat.md', $md.type, null, null, null $text.id = 80000 gosub sub.GetText $texts = create new array, size=2, elements=$text, null, null, null, null, null, null, null $text.id = 80100 gosub sub.GetText $texts[1] = $text $min.difficulty = 2 $max.difficulty = 5 end
if $a.settings do if $a.settings['min.difficulty'] $min.difficulty = $a.settings['min.difficulty'] do if $a.settings['max.difficulty'] $max.difficulty = $a.settings['max.difficulty'] do if $a.settings['min.reward'] $min.reward = $a.settings['min.reward'] do if $a.settings['max.reward'] $max.reword = $a.settings['max.reward'] do if $a.settings['min.boost'] $min.boost = $a.settings['min.boost'] do if $a.settings['max.boost'] $max.boost = $a.settings['max.boost'] do if $a.settings['min.xp'] $min.xp = $a.settings['min.xp'] do if $a.settings['max.xp'] $max.xp = $a.settings['max.xp'] $enemy = $a.settings['enemy'] end
if not $enemy $rnd = random value from 0 to 100 - 1 if $rnd >= 80 if $sector.owner == Pirates $enemy = Yaki else $enemy = Pirates end else if $rnd >= 70 if $sector.owner == Yaki $enemy = Pirates else $enemy = Yaki end else if $rnd >= 40 $enemy = Xenon else $enemy = get race random enemy: race=$sector.owner, exclude table=null end end
$level = $table.guild['level'] $level = random value from 0 to $level - 1 inc $level = $difficulty = random value from $min.difficulty to $max.difficulty - 1 $levels = create new array, size=2, elements=$level, $difficulty, null, null, null, null, null, null
$reward = random value from $min.reward to $max.reward - 1 $bonus = random value from $min.boost to $max.boost - 1 $reward = ( $reward * $level ) + ( $bonus * $difficulty )
$xp = random value from $min.xp to $max.xp - 1 $xp = ( $xp * $level ) + ( $xp.boost * $difficulty ) $rewards = table alloc $rewards['money'] = $reward $rewards['xp'] = $xp
* Do any overrides if $a.settings if $a.settings['texts'] $texts = $a.settings['texts'] else do if $a.settings['text.title'] $texts[0] = $a.settings['text.title'] do if $a.settings['text.desc'] $texts[1] = $a.settings['text.desc'] end
if $a.settings['levels'] $levels = $a.settings['levels'] else do if $a.settings['level'] $levels[0] = $a.settings['level'] do if $a.settings['difficulty'] $levels[1] = $a.settings['difficulty'] end
if $a.settings['rewards'] $rewards = $a.settings['rewards'] else do if $a.settings['money'] $rewards['money'] = $a.settings['reward'] do if $a.settings['xp'] $rewards['xp'] = $a.settings['xp'] if $a.settings['reward.extra'] $table = $a.settings['reward.extra'] $rewards = merge tables, $rewards, $table, null, null, null end end end
if is datatype[ $enemy ] == DATATYPE_ARRAY $enemy = get random array item: array=$enemy else if is datatype[ $enemy ] == DATATYPE_TABLE $enemy = get random key: table=$enemy end
$array = create new array, size=12, elements=$a.guild, $last.task, $texts, $sector, $a.type, 'created', $levels, $rewards $array[8] = $enemy $array[9] = $a.extraData $current.time = playing time $array[10] = $current.time $time = random value from 3600 to 9000 - 1 $time = $current.time + $time $array[11] = $time
$Guilds.Data['last.task'] = $last.task $table.tasks[$last.task] = $array
return $last.task
sub.GetText: $text = $text.id $text.amt = read text: page=$page.id id=$text.id $text.amt = string $text.amt to integer if $text.amt > 0 $rnd = random value from 0 to $text.amt - 1 $text = $text.id + 1 + $rnd end endsub return null

sval.val: Guilds: Add a new task for a guild
